description: CompositionSea green T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round ribbed neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the front FittingRegular Wash careonly hand wash separately inside outDry flat inside outWarm iron on reverseDo not bleach or scrub Declutter your life and keep the unwanted away in style with this sea green t-shirt from inkfruit. Walk with your head held high in this tee, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team it with jeans, knee-length pencil denim skirts or shorts for unparalleled cool.
